title: Repair Your Portal!
description: This mod limits the lighting of nether portals to only ruined portals in order to encourage players to form relationships with structures!
body:
# Functionality

This mod limits the lighting of nether portals to only repaired ruined portals! All methods of lighting portals is included, such as:

- Flint & Steel
- Fire Charge
- Fireball 
- Dispenser

### Why do this?

Removing the ability to build nether portals encourages the player to form a relationship with the structure, potentially developing infrastructure or building around the ruined portal.

# Config

Inside the config file for this mod, you can:
- Enable/disable a client-side message for attempting to light your own portal
- Customize the message for lighting your own portal
- Toggle whether portals inside of the nether need to be repaired ruined portals to activate

These features are helpful for modpack designers and server owners particularly.

Feel free to use this mod in a modpack!
